description: setAttribute gated sink: dangerous attrs fire, safe attrs suppressed, dynamic is conservative, payload-arg filtering

expected.notes: document.location flows into setAttribute('href', ...) — DOM XSS
document.location flows into setAttribute('onclick', ...) — DOM XSS via event handler
setAttribute('class', ...) is safe — no sink activation (regression guard)
setAttribute('data-name', ...) is safe — no sink activation (regression guard)
setAttribute(attrName, ...) with dynamic arg — conservative policy fires sink
setAttribute('href', constant) — dangerous attr but safe payload, must NOT fire (regression guard)
